message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state with latest development progress

Update beads issue tracking database to reflect current project status
including recently completed work on SQL comment stripping, cursor API
migration, schema introspection robustness, page-header routing, numeric
coercion parity, VDBE opcode hardening, cross-connection state refresh,
statement savepoints, and concurrency hardening.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
